MaxLineLength:AndroidClientDependencies.kt$AndroidClientDependencies$/** WebSocket transport hello resume token; shared across sessions like Flutter [ControlClientTransportHint.resumeToken]. */
MaxLineLength:AndroidFullscreenController.kt$AndroidFullscreenController$* @param immersiveStickyWhenEnabled When [enabled] is false, callers may pass `false`; the implementation ignores it.
MaxLineLength:AndroidNsdDiscovery.kt$" Often caused by multicast-restricted Wi‑Fi, guest/isolated APs, or device NSD quirks (common on Fire OS); use manual endpoint."
MaxLineLength:AndroidTerminalViewModel.kt$AndroidTerminalViewModel$/** Matches Flutter shell lifecycle: capability delta on foreground/background transitions (`app_lifecycle_change`). */
ReturnCount:ControlResponseDispatcher.kt$ControlResponseDispatcher$private fun effectiveTransitionDurationMs(normalized: String?, durationMs: Int): Long?
ReturnCount:ControlResponseDispatcher.kt$ControlResponseDispatcher$private fun replaceNode(root: Ui.Node, componentId: String, replacement: Ui.Node): Ui.Node
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AndroidControlSessionController.kt$AndroidControlSession$/** @return true when a sensor payload was sent (Flutter `buildSensorTelemetryRequest` non-null). */

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AndroidTerminalSettings.kt$AndroidTerminalSettings$/** * When local fullscreen is on (or server-driven fullscreen is applied), use immersive-sticky behavior * (transient system bars) vs plain immersive (bars stay until dismissed). */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AndroidTerminalViewModel.kt$AndroidTerminalViewModel$/** When false, periodic heartbeat and sensor telemetry are paused (Flutter `AppLifecycle` parity). */

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:AndroidTerminalViewModelTest.kt$AndroidTerminalViewModelTest.FakeSession$/** Per-call: `true` means [sendBugReport] throws for that attempt (flush continues). */
